'''kasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:glassily|glassily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glassily|glassily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kasate|kasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kasatesher|kasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasatesherĂ«m|kasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kasatero|kasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kasateshĂ«|kasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasateshĂ«m|kasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikasatero|gokikasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikasateshĂ«|gokikasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikasateshĂ«m|gokikasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokasankerom|gokasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokasankeshĂ«|gokasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokasankeshĂ«m|gokasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokasankeya|gokasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kasaterom|kasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasatemu|kasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kasateya|kasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikasaterom|gokikasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikasatemu|gokikasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikasateya|gokikasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kasasate|kasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kasasatesher|kasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasasatesherĂ«m|kasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kasasatero|kasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kasasateshĂ«|kasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasasateshĂ«m|kasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikasasatero|gokikasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikasasateshĂ«|gokikasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikasasateshĂ«m|gokikasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokasasankerom|gokasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokasasankeshĂ«|gokasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokasasankeshĂ«m|gokasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokasasankeya|gokasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kasasaterom|kasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kasasatemu|kasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kasasateya|kasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikasasaterom|gokikasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikasasatemu|gokikasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikasasateya|gokikasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠte|kĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠtesher|kĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠtero|kĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠtero|gokikĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠterom|kĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠtemu|kĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠsĂŠteya|kĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠterom|gokikĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠsĂŠteya|gokikĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafsafte|kafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafsaftesher|kafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafsaftesherĂ«m|kafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafsaftero|kafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafsafteshĂ«|kafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafsafteshĂ«m|kafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafsaftero|gokikafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafsafteshĂ«|gokikafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafsafteshĂ«m|gokikafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafsafnkerom|gokafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafsafnkeshĂ«|gokafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafsafnkeshĂ«m|gokafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafsafnkeya|gokafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafsafterom|kafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafsaftemu|kafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafsafteya|kafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafsafterom|gokikafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafsaftemu|gokikafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafsafteya|gokikafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
